reply_original: Hi there! Thank you so much for the 5-star rating. We are thrilled to have you with us in Fantasia! Your support is the fuel that keeps our team inspired to create even more magical memories for you. If you ever have suggestions or need help, feel free to reach out at support@fantachat.ai. Enjoy your journey with the characters!
reply_zh: 你好！非常感谢你的五星好评。我们很高兴能在 Fantasia 与你相遇！你的支持是激励我们团队为你创造更多奇妙回忆的动力。如果你有任何建议或需要帮助，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。祝你与角色们的旅程愉快！
